overall.description: Game engine footage from a fantasy castle setting (Hogwarts Legacy), exploring Gryffindor Tower areas including gothic corridors, ornate bathrooms, an industrial boiler room, and a wood-paneled map room. The camera moves smoothly through detailed interior spaces with high-quality lighting and architectural detail.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle corridor with stone arches

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone corridor, passing framed maps and wooden benches

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone blocks forming the corridor walls
heavy wooden door with intricate metal inlay and iron handle
large framed map hanging on the stone wall
simple stone bench beneath the framed map
gothic stone archway leading further down the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a gothic castle corridor with stone walls and arches. The camera moves forward past a framed map and stone bench, approaching an ornate wooden door with metal detailing.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular bathroom with central sink island and toilet stalls

events.description: enters the circular bathroom through the ornate wooden door
opens the 'Out of Order' stall door revealing the entrance to the Boiler Room

agents.ego_description: exploring the bathroom interior, examining the circular sink island and approaching the toilet stalls

entered.detail: circular island with multiple marble sinks arranged around a central pedestal
tall bronze statue of a mermaid atop the central sink island
row of white painted wooden toilet stall doors with metal hardware
tall arched window with leaded glass panes allowing natural light
ornate iron chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling
wooden sign reading 'Out of Order' hanging on a stall door

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a spacious bathroom featuring a circular island of marble sinks topped with a bronze mermaid statue. Natural light streams through tall gothic windows as the camera approaches a toilet stall marked 'Out of Order' and opens the door to reveal a passage to the Boiler Room.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial boiler room with steam equipment and firewood storage

events.description: steps into the industrial Boiler Room with large metal boiler and pipe network

agents.ego_description: examining the large industrial boiler and network of steam pipes and valves

entered.detail: large cylindrical metal boiler with decorative Celtic knot metalwork and riveted panels
network of large industrial steam pipes running along the walls and ceiling
piles of chopped firewood stacked against the stone wall
large black metal valve wheel for controlling steam flow

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an industrial boiler room dominated by a large metal boiler with decorative metalwork. The space features exposed pipe networks, valves, and stacks of firewood, illuminated by hanging lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular bathroom with central sink island

events.description: returns to the circular bathroom from the Boiler Room
exits the bathroom back into the stone corridor

agents.ego_description: walking back through the bathroom and exiting to the corridor

entered.detail: circular island with multiple marble sinks
heavy wooden door leading back to the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera returns to the circular bathroom and walks back through the space, passing the sink island once more before exiting through the wooden door into the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: rectangular bathroom with wall-mounted sinks and warm lighting

events.description: enters a second bathroom with wall-mounted sinks and warmer artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: exploring the bathroom, observing the framed portraits and wall-mounted sinks

entered.detail: row of white porcelain sinks mounted against the wall with brass fixtures
framed portrait hanging on the tiled wall
large potted fern plant in the corner
tall oval mirror with wooden frame
wooden vanity cabinet with decorative items

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a different bathroom featuring wall-mounted porcelain sinks, framed portraits, and warm artificial lighting. A large potted fern and oval mirror decorate the space as the camera moves past the toilet stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: wood-paneled hall with large map display and exhibit cases

events.description: enters a large wood-paneled room with a massive framed map and display cases

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor and approaching the large map display in the wood-paneled hall

entered.detail: dark wood paneled walls with decorative moldings
massive framed tapestry map hanging on the far wall
tall glass display case containing artifacts
tall narrow window with sunlight streaming through
large ornate rug covering the stone floor

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the bathroom and proceeds through stone corridors into a grand wood-paneled hall. Sunlight streams through tall windows, illuminating a large framed map on the wall and glass display cases containing artifacts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of gothic castle interiors, transitioning from cold stone corridors and industrial depths to a warm, sunlit hall. It begins by gliding through a stone corridor past a framed map and an ornate wooden door, which opens into a spacious bathroom where natural light illuminates a marble sink island and a bronze mermaid statue. As the camera passes through a toilet stall, the scene shifts abruptly into a dim, industrial boiler room filled with exposed pipes, hanging lanterns, and stacks of firewood before retreating back through the circular bathroom and into the hallway. The movement then leads into a second, more intimate bathroom featuring porcelain sinks and framed portraits under warm artificial light, before finally emerging into a grand wood-paneled hall. This final space opens up as sunlight streams through tall windows, highlighting glass display cases and a large framed map on the wall.
